description: Datagma is a real-time B2B enrichment tool that finds verified emails and mobile numbers via a Chrome extension, API, or upload, charging only for valid data.
tagline: Find emails and enrich B2B data
overview: Datagma finds verified business emails and mobile numbers in real time through a Chrome extension, API, and file upload, with GDPR compliance and pay-for-valid pricing.
what_is: Datagma is a B2B enrichment tool that returns verified emails and mobile numbers in real time rather than from a static database. It is GDPR-conscious and charges only for the data that comes back valid, which keeps spend tied to usable contacts.

It is strongest at enriching contact lists, detecting job changes, extracting contacts from LinkedIn or X, and bulk-updating CRM records. Results are instant, so teams get fresh data into outreach quickly.

Datagma integrates through API, file upload, and a Chrome extension to enrich CRMs and tools like HubSpot. It focuses on enrichment rather than running campaigns or long-term storage, keeping your CRM current without replacing the stack.
